package.name: exo_cmd
package.description: WSL-side ROS2 nodes for the exoskeleton minimal serial loopback. Publishes /exo/cmd_heartbeat (Int32, 10 Hz, wrap-mod-2^31 counter) and subscribes /exo/mcu_status to verify the round-trip and monitor link health (RTT / loss / duplicate / reconciliation, contract §7). Also ships a local loopback node with fault injection that mimics the MCU for hardware-free self-test. Interface contract: docs/01-ros2-microros-serial/01-接口契约.md (v1.1).
